name: The Agent of Life - Neptune
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>命</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いのち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>代</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>行</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ネプチューン
desc: You can discard this card; Special Summon 1 "The Agent" monster from your hand or GY, except "The Agent of Life - Neptune", or, if "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field or in either GY, you can Special Summon 1 "Hyperion" monster instead. Neither player can Tribute a monster Summoned with this effect, until the end of your opponent's turn. If this card is banished: You can add 1 "The Sanctuary in the Sky" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "The Agent of Life - Neptune" once per turn.

You can only use each effect of "The Agent of Life - Neptune" once per turn.
